qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of compiling GROMACS with CP2K support?
qa_pairs.answer: Compiling GROMACS with CP2K support enables Hybrid Quantum-Classical simulations (QM/MM).

qa_pairs.question: Which GROMACS versions can be compiled with CP2K support?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS versions 2022 and newer can be compiled with CP2K support.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find documentation on how to build GROMACS with CP2K QM/MM support?
qa_pairs.answer: Documentation on building GROMACS with CP2K QM/MM support can be found in the install guide, specifically under "Building GROMACS with CP2K QM/MM support".

qa_pairs.question: Is there a reference in the GROMACS manual for QM/MM simulations with CP2K?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, there is a reference in the GROMACS Reference manual titled "QM/MM with CP2K in the GROMACS Reference manual" that provides information on Hybrid Quantum-Classical simulations (QM/MM).
